title: trixis chiapensis
intro: Trixis chiapensis, also known as Hierba de la Virgen, is a plant species native to Mexico, belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Trixis chiapensis include relief from digestive issues, reduction in fever, and alleviation of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are typically used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
